name: Beefy Spanish Rice
recipeIngredient: 14 1/2 oz Ca  whole tomatoes, drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté the chopped green pepper and celery in hot oil until tender. Drain any excess fat.
2. Add the ground beef to the skillet and cook until browned, breaking it up as needed.
3. Stir in the crushed garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
4. In a separate bowl, mix together the vegetable oil, drained tomatoes, tomato sauce, rice, bay leaf, and red pepper.
5. Pour the tomato mixture into the skillet with the beef and stir to combine.
6. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
7. Dissolve the bouillon granules in boiling water and add them to the rice mixture.
8. Stir in any remaining ingredients, such as chili powder.
9. Transfer the mixture to an 8-inch square baking dish. Cover with foil or a lid.
10. Bake at 350°F for 35 minutes.
11. Remove the bay leaf before serving.
Yield: 4 to 6 servings
